title: Anomalous spikes in playbook execution failure
description: It monitors anomalous spikes in playbook failure rates by comparing failed vs total executions over time. Sudden increases may signal logic issues, integration failures, or dependency problems, impacting automation reliability and efficiency.

definition.name: Anomalous spikes in playbook execution failure
definition.query: avg(last_4h):anomalies(sum:palo_alto_networks_cortex_xsoar.playbook_execution.failed_count{*} by {playbook_name}.as_count() / sum:palo_alto_networks_cortex_xsoar.playbook_execution.count{*} by {playbook_name}.as_count(), 'basic', 2, direction='above', interval=60, alert_window='last_10m', count_default_zero='true') >= 0.6
